---
name: Spec question
about: Ask the spec agent to clarify ambiguous or missing format/contract behavior
title: "[spec] "
labels: spec
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Use this when CONTRACTS.md or docs/ does not give you enough to implement
without guessing. Do not guess in code and file later: ask first.
No em dashes (CLAUDE.md universal rule 4).
-->

## Where
<!-- File and section, e.g. CONTRACTS.md "Hive File Format Invariants" #11,
     or docs/hive-format.md section 3.4. -->

## The ambiguity
<!-- What is unclear or unspecified, in one or two sentences. -->

## Why it blocks you
<!-- What you cannot implement or test until this is resolved. -->

## What you observed (if anything)
<!-- offreg behavior, corpus hive contents, or a Suhanov citation that
     bears on the answer. The spec agent decides; evidence speeds it up. -->

## Proposed resolution (optional)
<!-- If you have a prototype or a preferred answer, state it. Per
     docs/CLAUDE.md the spec agent will not add contract surface that has
     no implementation behind it. -->
